name: Slayer Of Terramorphous
description: Bandit class mod for Krieg the Psycho. Drops from Terramorphous the Invincible. Built around Blood Trance, Thrill of the Kill, Strip the Flesh, Burn, Baby, Burn, Flame Flare, Sentry, Ready, Impact, Expertise, Healthy.
notes: Part of a set of Terramorphous-only items. Collecting all of them combines their red text into a short poem.

special.description: At max level, Krieg's Slayer Of Terramorphous grants: Burn Damage: +37% Ignite Chance: +37% Health: +1,101,229
